calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Order Transferring Venue Of Action To The Centeral District For The County Of L.A. And Req. For For Award If Attorneys Fees If $3437.50 Against Yeroushalmi & Assoc.
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Sato, Esq., 310.623.1926, for plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group.
Jason Weisberg, Esq., 818.992.9999, for defendant National Stores Inc.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification. DEFENDANT NATIONAL STORES INC.'S Motion For An Order Transferring Venue Of Action To The Central District For The County Of L.A. is granted per stipulation of counsel. Defendant's request For Award Of Attorneys Fees Of $3437.50 Against Yeroushalmi & Associates is withdrawn by the defendant. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
